perceptual_narrative_logs.visual_narrative_log: (1) A man and a woman stand behind a kitchen island cluttered with calendars; the man holds one up to the camera, his expression animated and mouth wide as if shouting. (2) The man begins flipping through the 2025 desk calendar, displaying various pages featuring photos of himself in different outfits and locations, while the woman beside him smiles, points at the pages, and reacts with laughter. (3) The man continues flipping through the stack of calendars, eventually pointing a finger directly at the camera with a determined look to emphasize the instructions in the text overlay.
perceptual_narrative_logs.audio_narrative_log: (1) Upbeat, energetic background music with a fast tempo starts immediately; a high-pitched, loud male voice begins a rapid-fire monologue about a calendar giveaway. (2) A female voice joins in intermittently with laughter and short affirmative responses as the male voice explains the giveaway period and the contents of the calendar. (3) The sound of paper pages flipping is audible underneath the constant, high-density narration; the male voice maintains an excited, promotional tone until the end.
perceptual_narrative_logs.text_narrative_log: (1) Functional Text: A blue banner at the top reads '嘎哥2025桌曆 抽40本 快到Apple Podcast留五星好評。留言參加抽獎' (Ga Ge 2025 Desk Calendar Giveaway 40 copies. Go to Apple Podcast leave 5-star review. Comment to participate). (2) Functional Text: Subtitles throughout the bottom translate the spoken Chinese dialogue. (3) Decorative/Hook Text: Occasional emojis appearing within the subtitles to emphasize emotional cues.

temporal_pacing_summary.mainActionFlow: Intro/Hook -> Product Demonstration -> Call to Action

visual_human_presence.countingEvidence: 1 main male creator (Ga Ge), 1 female co-host (Er Gu)
visual_human_presence.mainCharacterDescription: The man wears a grey and white striped sweater; the woman wears a grey sweatshirt with 'PALATABLE' printed on it.

visual_scene_and_style.backgroundDescribe: A modern indoor kitchen or studio space with white cabinets, a clean countertop, and some kitchen items in the background.

audio_production_style.audioTransition: Hard cut at beginning and end

narrative_and_purpose.mainPurpose: The video's primary purpose is a marketing giveaway to drive engagement for the creator's podcast. By offering 40 limited-edition 2025 calendars, the creator incentivizes viewers to leave positive reviews on Apple Podcasts, thereby boosting their show's algorithm and visibility.

endorsement_analysis.endorsementCues: The creator is directly holding and showing his own branded product and asking for specific social media engagement in exchange for it.

social_sociology_tags.uniqueSignatures: Fast-paced delivery, exaggerated facial expressions, 'Ga Ge' (嘎哥) persona.
social_sociology_tags.freeDescribe: This is a typical high-energy fan-engagement video common among top Taiwanese influencers.
